evals.description: Full site scope — verifies all sections present and schema detection note included
assertions: Returns valid JSON without a top-level error field
url field matches the input url
scope field is 'site'
meta object contains title, description, robots, canonical, viewport, og, and twitter fields
headings object contains h1, h2, h3, h4 arrays and an issues array
links object contains internal_count, external_count, broken_candidates, and sample_anchors
images object contains total, missing_alt, missing_dimensions, and formats fields
schema object contains types_found array and detection_note string mentioning JS-injected schema limitation
ai_crawler_accessibility contains gptbot, claudebot, perplexitybot, and google_extended fields, each with value 'allowed', 'disallowed', or 'not_specified'
content_structure contains answer_first_paragraphs, faq_section_present, question_headings_count, and question_headings_pct fields
performance object is present (score may be null if API unavailable)
security object contains https (boolean) and mixed_content (boolean)
summary object contains critical_issues, warnings, and passed arrays
robots_txt and sitemap objects are present for site scope
Output contains no prose, recommendations, or editorial content outside the JSON structure

evals.description: Page scope only — sitemap and multi-page fields not required
assertions: Returns valid JSON without a top-level error field
scope field is 'page'
meta, headings, links, images, schema, ai_crawler_accessibility, content_structure, security, and summary fields all present
sitemap field is present (may be null for page scope)
Returns JSON with a top-level error field
Error object includes the url field matching the input
Does not return empty JSON or throw an unhandled exception
